01

Aura
Vinyl Player

A record player that pairs the ritual of vinyl with a transparent OLED interface, tactile controls and a soft domestic form.

PROJECT

Individual concept

METHODS

Sketching · CAD · Rendering

FOCUS

Interaction · CMF

OUTPUT

Product + interface proposal

Final hero renderProduct language
Design intent

Retro object, modern interaction.

The speaker keeps the emotional ritual of vinyl while adding a digital layer that feels ambient rather than distracting.

Full product renderTransparent lid
Aura · Page 02 / 04 · Key interaction

Lyrics that
float on glass

Lyrics and playback information appear on the glass only when needed, then disappear into the object when the record stops.

Display typeTransparent OLED
Glass modeSmart Glass · 3 states
ConnectivityMusic app / Wi-Fi
UI featureLive lyric scroll
OLED Active · Spotify Connected

Previous line fades on glass

Soft contrast keeps focus

Ambient words rise slowly

Although you got beaucoup family

Next line waits below

0:15−4:51
⏮❚❚⏭
♫
NightsFrank Ocean · Blond

02

ArthiAir
Hair Dryer

A hands-free hair dryer for people with arthritis, limited shoulder mobility or reduced grip strength.

PROJECT

Inclusive design concept

METHODS

Journey mapping · Ideation

FOCUS

Ergonomics · Independence

OUTPUT

Resolved domestic product

Problem

Hands-free drying for
limited mobility

A wall-mounted spine and sliding airflow arm move the drying action into the product, reducing grip and arm elevation.

ArthritisReduced shoulder movementLow grip demandWall mounted
ArthiAir · Page 02 / 03 · Process

User journey and
concept development

Use storyboardHands-free sequence
Early conceptsMobility concepts
01

Reduced arm elevation

The user avoids holding a dryer above the head for long periods.

02

Sliding airflow arms

The arm travels vertically to target crown, mid-lengths and lower hair.

03

Domestic appearance

Soft metallic surfaces keep the product away from a clinical aesthetic.

04

Independent routine

The system supports safer, lower-effort daily hair drying at home.

ArthiAir · Page 03 / 03 · Outcome

Resolved product and
movement logic

Resolved productControl panel + form
Movement logicAirflow + sliding mechanism
Alternative directionsConcept comparison
